description: Replace the two-phase approach in Ready()/Blocked() with: build subtrees, compute effective_blocked_by for each root (external blockers from entire subtree), suppress descendants, run plain allBlockersResolved. Remove reclassify logic, readyRoots/blockedRoots. Cross-ref: octo-kbd.1
title: Simplify ready/blocked: bubble-up external blockers, drop reclassify
